description.en: 3dsecure.io provides an acquirer-agnostic 3-D Secure Merchant Plug-in (MPI) offered as a SaaS, designed to help merchants and PSPs run EMV 3-D Secure authentication flows with a simple API integration.

excerpt: Acquirer-agnostic 3-D Secure MPI (SaaS) to run EMV 3DS authentication via a simple API integration.

content_features.title: Acquirer-agnostic 3DS routing
content_features.description: Run 3-D Secure authentication without being locked to a single acquirer integration, using an MPI approach.

content_features.title: API-first integration
content_features.description: Designed for server-to-server use so you can trigger 3DS authentication as part of your checkout and authorization flow.

content_features.title: Supports EMV 3-D Secure flows
content_features.description: Implements modern 3DS authentication patterns (including challenge and frictionless outcomes, depending on issuer decisioning).

content_features.title: Declines and approval-rate hygiene
content_features.description: Use consistent 3DS data and correct transaction context to reduce avoidable issuer declines related to authentication mismatches.

content_features.title: Fraud and liability-shift workflows
content_features.description: Helps you apply 3DS where appropriate to manage fraud exposure and support issuer authentication requirements.

content_features.title: Merchant and PSP use cases
content_features.description: Suitable for merchants building their own payments stack and for PSPs offering 3DS as a capability to sub-merchants.

content_features.title: Operational reliability
content_features.description: Centralizes 3DS handling in one service, simplifying monitoring and troubleshooting of authentication steps across acquirers.

content_features.title: Approval rate visibility
content_features.description: Review 3dsecure.io approval rates and issuer decline patterns by market, card type, and currency before changing routing or retry rules.

tip: If you see higher declines after enabling 3DS, double-check that the authentication outcome, transaction identifiers, and ECI/CAVV data are passed correctly into authorization.

faq.question: What is 3dsecure.io?
faq.answer: 3dsecure.io is a 3-D Secure Merchant Plug-in (MPI) offered as a SaaS to help merchants and PSPs run EMV 3-D Secure authentication as part of card-not-present checkout flows.

faq.question: Is 3dsecure.io a PSP or acquirer?
faq.answer: It is positioned as a 3DS provider/MPI rather than a payment service provider or acquiring bank; you typically use it alongside your existing PSP and acquirer setup.

faq.question: Can 3DS affect approval rates or declines?
faq.answer: Yes. Incorrect or inconsistent 3DS data passed into authorization can lead to issuer declines; when implemented correctly, 3DS can also help meet issuer authentication expectations for certain transactions.

faq.question: Which 3DS protocol does it support?
faq.answer: It is marketed for 3-D Secure (EMV 3-D Secure) authentication use cases; confirm the exact version and capabilities with the provider during integration.

faq.question: How should merchants monitor 3dsecure.io performance?
faq.answer: Track challenge rates, frictionless rates, authentication failures, issuer declines, and downstream chargeback trends by issuer and market before changing your 3DS strategy.

seo.seo_description: 3dsecure.io offers an acquirer-agnostic 3-D Secure Merchant Plug-in (MPI) as a SaaS to integrate EMV 3DS authentication into online card payments.
seo.keywords: 3-D Secure, EMV 3DS, MPI, merchant plug-in, 3DS authentication, card-not-present, fraud prevention
